message: Files found more than 4 directory levels deep
suggestion: Flatten deeply nested folder structures where possible — deep nesting makes navigation and imports harder to maintain.

message: No README.md found at the project root
suggestion: Add a README.md to document what the project does, how to run it, and any environment variables required.

message: Multiple config files (.env, .config.*, etc.) found in unexpected locations
suggestion: Keep all environment and config files at the project root. Avoid scattering .env files inside subdirectories.

message: Test files mixed into source directories without a dedicated __tests__/ or tests/ folder
suggestion: Organise tests in a top-level __tests__/ directory or co-locate them as *.test.ts next to the files they test.
